headline: S&P Global Has Quietly Become One of the Widest-Moat Stocks in Finance
summary: No would-be rival is in a position to even try to dethrone this well-entrenched outfit from its role as the leading market data provider.

headline: Ledn launches new first-of-its-kind Bitcoin-backed ABS with BBB- rating from S&P
summary: Ledn's $188 million Bitcoin-backed bond just became the first digital asset product to receive an investment-grade rating from S&P Global. Its CEO explains why eight years of data made the difference. In February 2026, Ledn closed a $188 million Bitcoin-backed asset-backed security — the first ...

headline: The market shakes off hot inflation data
summary: We got a hot April Consumer Price Index (CPI) number, driven in a big way by energy costs, but even core CPI was surprisingly high, driven by a jump in shelter costs for the first time in a while. The April Producer Price Index (PPI) was even further above estimates. On May 12th, the ...

headline: S&P Global Ties AI And Energy Insights To Capital IQ Pro
summary: S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) has integrated S&P Global Energy news and insights into its Capital IQ Pro platform. The company has also launched HorizonsAgents, an AI powered suite designed to support energy, finance, and sustainability workflows. These updates aim to give institutional clients broader access to data and analytics linked to the energy transition and AI driven workflows. S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) provides indices, credit ratings, and data solutions that many investors and companies...

headline: S&P Global and the S&P Global Foundation Announce Next Phase In $10 Million StepForward Initiative
summary: S&P Global and the S&P Global Foundation today announced their support for StepForward, a three-year $10 million initiative1 aimed at equipping the next generation with the skills needed to succeed in an AI-enabled workforce.
